utterance_pair.utterance: Hello! I'm planning to travel from Norwich to Cambridge by train next Monday. Could you help me find a train that leaves after 09:15 AM? Also, by the way, what is the largest city in the UK?

Great, thanks! Can you please show me the available trains from Norwich to Cambridge on Monday, departing after 09:15? I need to book for 3 people. Also, what time do trains typically start operating in the UK?

Yes, please go ahead and book 3 tickets for the 09:16 train from Norwich to Cambridge next Monday. And while you do that, could you also help me find and book a room at Hobsons House hotel in Cambridge for the same 3 people, for 5 nights starting that Monday? I just read that Cambridge has some of the best university libraries in the world, known for their historic collections and architecture.
Thank you! Could you please provide me with the reference numbers for both my train booking and hotel reservation? Also, what time does the last train usually leave from Norwich on a Monday?

Thanks for the reference numbers! While you check on the last train from Norwich on Monday, could you also tell me if Hobsons House offers any breakfast options included with the stay? I recently read that the average temperature in Cambridge during the summer can reach up to 25 degrees Celsius. It's fascinating how the climate can influence the local flora and fauna, especially the flowering plants that bloom around that time.
Could you please tell me the departure time of the last train from Norwich on Monday, and also what are the visiting hours at the hospital?
